facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this seafood spot on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. Their loss. Blue Seafood Restaurant pulls 4.7 stars across 900 reviews and the locals know exactly why. Fresh catches, no resort markup, real Phu Quoc flavors. Street address: 34 Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Khu 1. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the seafood land straight on the table at Blue Seafood Restaurant. 4.7 stars. 900 reviews. Đường Nguyễn Trãi delivers.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Blue Seafood Restaurant. 4.7★, 900 reviews, Đường Nguyễn Trãi. Save this before your trip.
instagram.video_caption: 4.7 stars on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. The seafood speaks for itself. Tag your travel buddy.
